course_description: The objective of this course is to write a critique of the literature in an area of specialisation, to develop archival skills in that area and also to develop an understanding of the literature, theory and practice in the chosen area. Approval of the Program Director is required to be granted permission to enrol.

restrictions: MPsychOrg or permission of Director of Organisational Psychology programs

course_aims:
1.ﾠ to write a critique of the literature in an area of specialisation relevant to industrial and organisational psychology

2.ﾠ to develop archival skills in that area

3.ﾠ to develop an understanding of the literature, theory & practice in the chosen area

learning_outcomes.description: The objective of this course is to write a critique of the literature in an area of specialisation & to develop archival skills in that area; develop an understanding of the literature, theory & practice in the chosen area.

assessment_summary.title: Literature Review
assessment_summary.due_date: 11/06/2025 2:00 pm; to be submitted directly to supervisor

assessment_details.title: Literature Review
assessment_details.due_date: 11/06/2025 2:00 pm to be submitted directly to supervisor
assessment_details.task_description: 5000-word literature review Read full task description Hide full task description
assessment_details.submission_guidelines:
literature review to be submitted via Turnitin and directly to supervisor.
Deferral or extension
You may be able to apply for an extension .
The maximum extension allowed is 14 days. Extensions are given in multiples of 24 hours.
For full details please review the School of Psychology Student Guidelines - Extensions and Deferred quiz/exam.
Late submission
A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessment_details.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension .
assessment_details.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
